topic: The £10 fitting that lets your garden feed itself too (fertigation)
voiceover_script: This ten pound fitting feeds every bed automatically, every time it waters. Feeding a garden by hand means a watering can, a jug of liquid feed, and remembering to actually do it. A venturi injector tees into the main water line and sucks a weak feed mix into the flow every time the pump runs — no electronics, no moving parts. For more control, a small dosing pump on a spare relay channel can feed one bed at a time with its own exact dose. Hungry crops get more, herbs get almost none — every bed fed exactly right, with zero extra effort. The full fertigation upgrade, with the dosing maths worked out, is in the build plans — link in bio.

scenes.text: This ten pound fitting feeds every bed automatically, every time it waters.
Feeding a garden by hand means a watering can, a jug of liquid feed, and remembering to actually do it.
A venturi injector tees into the main water line and sucks a weak feed mix into the flow every time the pump runs — no electronics, no moving parts.
For more control, a small dosing pump on a spare relay channel can feed one bed at a time with its own exact dose.
Hungry crops get more, herbs get almost none — every bed fed exactly right, with zero extra effort.
The full fertigation upgrade, with the dosing maths worked out, is in the build plans — link in bio.
